article_meta.title: News Law & the Courts Black Lives Matter Director Spent Millions in Donations on Homes, Shopping, Vacations, Indictment

reasoning: The summary remains largely neutral and attributed, avoiding the article’s more charged framing. It includes one mildly loaded phrase ("luxury shopping") and a broad generalization about "misuse of millions" in other cases that is not fully supported, but overall does not inherit the source’s rhetoric.

custom_reasoning.spin: Mostly neutral verbs with attribution; one loaded choice ("luxury shopping").
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Generalizes that other cases involved "misuse of millions" without precise attribution; one case cited involved a smaller amount.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Few subjective assertions; claims are framed as allegations/indictment.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Tone is measured; avoids the article’s more dramatic phrases like "spending spree."
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks by the model.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about intentions or thoughts.
custom_reasoning.slant: Focus matches the article’s prosecutorial angle but remains attributed; no counter-perspective was present to include.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Does not note the denial/no-charges context for other figures mentioned in the article, though not central to the main case.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Negative content mirrors the article’s focus on alleged misconduct.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No preferential deference to elite or grassroots sources.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Clearly more neutral than the source, with consistent use of attribution.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Captures the indictment and broader scrutiny; article offered little to no defense perspective to include.
